text:
(In reply to eimar.koort from comment #4)
(In reply to eimar.koort from comment #4)
<<And why did 13-CURRENT snapshot version from october 2020 boot fine?>>

because of the firmware. RPI4 4GB-model, right?

so now you have the easiest bugfix ever seen :-) :
simply overwrite the whole October 2020-msdos-partition to your current  disk 
if you felt comfortable with it.
